Off Calendar Dec-27-2016 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Dec-13-2016 Continued To Dec-27-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-29-2016 Continued To Dec-13-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory And Appraisal And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-24-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Bridgman for and with (petitioner) Ingrid Anders.

Mr. Bridgman reported that he has filed the petition for final distribution and waiver of account and that he hopes to have a hearing date in December. The Court took the status of filing and inventory & approval and petition for final distribution as well as the Order to Appear off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-24-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Bond
Off Calendar Oct-04-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Bond
Off Calendar Sep-27-2016 Continued To Oct-04-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory And Appraisal And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-21-2016 Continued To Oct-24-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

the Court stated that it is 10:15 a.m. and there is no appearance. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Ingrid Anders and the Attorney James Bridgman to appear on October 24, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the bond and Petition for Final Distribution has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Chan. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory And Appraisal And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-07-2016 Continued To Sep-21-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Ingrid Anders and the Attorney James Bridgman to appear on October 3, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the petition for final distribution has not been filed and that an ex parte petition for increase in bond be filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Subsequent to the hearing a message was received indicating that the ex parte has been filed. The Order to Appear will not be issued and the status of filing a Petition for Final Distribution was continued to September 21, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Fender. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Sep-07-2016 Off Calendar

Petition For Substitution Of Attorney Ccp 284 2
Off Calendar Jun-08-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Bridgeman, for and with petitioner Ingrid Anders.

In response to an inquiry from the Court, Mr. Bridgeman confirmed that neither he nor the petitioner have received any word or cooperation from Mr. Tamases regarding the petition for substitution of counsel. The Court granted the petition (order signed), and set a status hearing re inventory and appraisal filing status for September 7, 2016, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: John Boncato. (Not reported)
